name: Alternate Incline Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Sit on an incline bench set to 45-60 degrees, holding a dumbbell in each hand at arm's length.
Curl one dumbbell while keeping the upper arm stationary, rotating your wrist as you lift.
Lower the weight slowly and repeat with the other arm.

name: Barbell Bench Press - Medium Grip
instructions: Lie back on a flat bench and grip the barbell with a medium-width overhand grip.
Lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with locked arms.
Lower the bar to the middle of your chest, then push it back up to the starting position.

name: Barbell Deadlift
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart, bar over mid-foot.
Hinge at hips and grip the bar just outside your legs.
Drive through your heels and extend hips and knees simultaneously to stand up.
Lower the bar in a controlled manner back to the floor.

name: Barbell Squat
instructions: Set the bar on a rack at upper-chest height and step under it so it rests on your upper traps.
Unrack the bar and take two steps back.
Break at hips and knees simultaneously, sitting back and down until thighs are parallel.
Drive through your heels to stand back up.

name: Barbell Overhead Press
instructions: Grip the bar just outside shoulder width at collarbone height.
Press the bar overhead until arms are fully locked out.
Lower back to the collarbone under control.

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Hang from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip wider than shoulder width.
Pull yourself up until your chin is above the bar.
Lower yourself slowly back to the starting position.

name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Stand holding dumbbells in front of your thighs.
Push your hips back while keeping your back flat and lower the weights along your legs.
Feel a deep stretch in the hamstrings, then drive your hips forward to stand up.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand next to a low cable pulley and grip the handle with the far hand.
Raise your arm out to the side to shoulder height with a slight bend at the elbow.
Lower slowly and repeat.

name: Plank
instructions: Lie face down and prop yourself up on forearms and toes.
Keep your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Hold the position while breathing normally.

name: Hip Thrust
instructions: Sit on the floor with your upper back against a bench and a barbell across your hips.
Plant your feet flat and drive through your heels to raise your hips until they are parallel to the floor.
Squeeze your glutes at the top, then lower under control.
